description_long: This is a muscular adult male figure with a defined torso and visible musculature, standing in a neutral pose with arms slightly outstretched. The figure has short, closely cropped hair and a stern facial expression. He is wearing a simple, loose-fitting knee-length skirt with a thick waistband, leaving his upper body and feet exposed. The skin surface is smooth with subtle anatomical details such as collarbones, pectoral muscles, and visible veins on the arms. The back view reveals well-defined shoulder blades and a broad back, while the side views highlight the natural curvature of the spine and the relaxed position of the hands. The overall appearance suggests a generic, athletic pedestrian suitable for urban or historical settings.
description: A muscular adult male with short hair, bare upper body, and a loose knee-length skirt, standing upright with arms slightly out. Anatomically detailed and barefoot, with a neutral, athletic build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the defined chest, abdominal muscles, facial features, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, chest, and the relaxed position of the left arm and hand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the muscular back, shoulder blades, and the skirt's waistband, with both arms visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, chest, and the relaxed position of the right arm and hand.
attribute_clothing_type: loose knee-length skirt with a thick waistband
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
